---
title: "Codebook"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="masthead">
  <span>Electoral Atlas · Spanish Second Republic · 1931–1936</span>
  <div class="lang-switcher">
    <a href="../en/codebook.html" class="lang-btn active">EN</a>
    <a href="../es/codebook.html" class="lang-btn">ES</a>
    <a href="../ca/codebook.html" class="lang-btn">CA</a>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-header-flag"></div>
  <div class="page-header-label">Documentation</div>
  <h1 class="page-header-title">Codebook</h1>
  <p class="page-header-sub">Variable definitions, sources, and methodological notes</p>
</div>

<section class="content-section">
  <div class="section-label">Dataset documentation</div>
  <h2 class="section-title">How to read the data</h2>
  <p class="section-body">
    The codebook describes every variable in the dataset: how each was collected,
    how it was coded, what the unit of analysis is, and any known limitations or
    caveats. It is the essential companion to the electoral atlas and to the
    underlying dataset.
  </p>
  <p class="section-body">
    The full codebook is available as a PDF document below. It will be updated
    as the dataset evolves.
  </p>

  <!-- PDF VIEWER -->
  <!-- Once you have your PDF, replace the placeholder below with:
       <iframe src="../pdfs/codebook.pdf" class="codebook-embed"></iframe>
  -->
  <div class="codebook-placeholder">
    <div class="codebook-placeholder-icon">📄</div>
    <div class="codebook-placeholder-text">
      Codebook PDF will appear here<br>
      <span style="opacity:0.6;margin-top:0.4rem;display:block;">
        Place your file at <code>pdfs/codebook.pdf</code> and uncomment the iframe
      </span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- DOWNLOAD LINK -->
  <div style="text-align:center;margin-top:1.5rem;">
    <a href="../pdfs/codebook.pdf" class="contact-submit" download>
      ↓ &nbsp; Download Codebook (PDF)
    </a>
  </div>

  <!-- VARIABLE SUMMARY TABLE -->
  <div class="section-label mt-lg">Variable reference</div>
  <h3 class="section-title" style="font-size:1.3rem;">Key variables at a glance</h3>

  <div style="overflow-x:auto;margin-top:1.5rem;">
    <table style="width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:0.85rem;">
      <thead>
        <tr style="background:var(--ink);color:var(--parchment);">
          <th style="padding:0.65rem 0.85rem;text-align:left;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">Variable</th>
          <th style="padding:0.65rem 0.85rem;text-align:left;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">Description</th>
          <th style="padding:0.65rem 0.85rem;text-align:left;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">Range</th>
          <th style="padding:0.65rem 0.85rem;text-align:left;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:0.65rem;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">Available</th>
        </tr>
      </thead>
      <tbody>
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--aged);">
          <td style="padding:0.65rem 0.85rem;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--republic);">cod_muni</td>
          <td style="padding:0.65rem 0.85rem;">Municipality identifier</td>
          <td style="padding:0.65rem 0.85rem;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:0.75rem;">String</td>
          <td style="padding:0.65rem 0.85rem;">All years</td>
        </tr>
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--aged);background:rgba(245,240,232,0.4);">
          <td style="padding:0.65rem 0.85rem;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--republic);">left_[year]</td>
          <td style="padding:0.65rem 0.85rem;">Vote share of left-wing parties</td>
          <td style="padding:0.65rem 0.85rem;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:0.75rem;">0 – 1</td>
          <td style="padding:0.65rem 0.85rem;">1931, 1933, 1936</td>
        </tr>
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--aged);">
          <td style="padding:0.65rem 0.85rem;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--republic);">right_[year]</td>
          <td style="padding:0.65rem 0.85rem;">Vote share of right-wing parties</td>
          <td style="padding:0.65rem 0.85rem;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:0.75rem;">0 – 1</td>
          <td style="padding:0.65rem 0.85rem;">1931, 1933, 1936</td>
        </tr>
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--aged);background:rgba(245,240,232,0.4);">
          <td style="padding:0.65rem 0.85rem;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--republic);">other_[year]</td>
          <td style="padding:0.65rem 0.85rem;">Vote share of other / regional parties</td>
          <td style="padding:0.65rem 0.85rem;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:0.75rem;">0 – 1</td>
          <td style="padding:0.65rem 0.85rem;">1931, 1933, 1936</td>
        </tr>
        <tr style="border-bottom:1px solid var(--aged);">
          <td style="padding:0.65rem 0.85rem;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--republic);">turnout_[year]</td>
          <td style="padding:0.65rem 0.85rem;">Voter turnout (votes cast / registered voters)</td>
          <td style="padding:0.65rem 0.85rem;font-family:var(--font-mono);font-size:0.75rem;">0 – 1</td>
          <td style="padding:0.65rem 0.85rem;">1931, 1933, 1936</td>
        </tr>
      </tbody>
    </table>
  </div>
</section>

<footer class="site-footer">
  <p>Electoral Atlas of the Spanish Second Republic &nbsp;·&nbsp; Universitat Pompeu Fabra &nbsp;·&nbsp; 2025</p>
</footer>
```
